Earthing Technical Requirements.description: Install new Air break switch earthing as per EDI0006 & drawing B348252

Specific Earthing Standards.description: All OH line design as per MDI0031 & MCI0005

LandInterestGuidelines.description: No specific mention of 'Land Interests' section or checkbox for 'NA' in the provided sections.

RequiredEasements.description: No explicit details regarding required easements for new HV/LV lines or substation sites found in the provided sections.

PropertyAccessConditions.description: No specific conditions regarding access to private property or creation of right-of-ways for Endeavour Energy assets found in the provided sections.

Preferred Payment Method.description: EFT is the primary method for payment.

Mandatory Transaction References.description: Unique alphanumeric reference code ARP4983A2 must be quoted in the EFT transaction field.

Remittance and Restriction Requirements.description: Email remittance copies to remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au. Credit cards and cheques are not accepted.

Invoice Policy.description: A formal Tax Invoice will be issued following the receipt of payment.

LV_Work_Requirements.description: Remove existing OH LV conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121.
Install new OH LV conductor 7/4.50AAC from new pole 2 to pole 426121.

Redirect the existing LV OH conductor to new poles 1 & 2. If the existing LV conductor length is insufficient, terminate existing LV conductor 7/4.50AAV on new pole 1 & install new span of LV bare 7/4.50AAC from new poles 1 to 2.

Compliance_Standards.description: All OH line design as per MDI0031 & MCI0005.

SL_Works.description: Relocate existing pole 283061, 283062 & 283063 to the new road alignment as per MDI0031 requirements.
Remove existing OH SL conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121 and from pole 283062 to pole 283063.
Existing OH SL conductor to be redirected from pole 426129 to new pole 1 & pole 2.
Install new SL conductor 25mm^2 2C from new pole 2 to pole 426121 and from new pole 2 to pole 3.
Remove all existing street lighting on poles 283061 & 283063.
Install new streetlighting on new poles 1 & 3 as per LDI0001 requirements.
Install new additional luminaires and light pole as per the lighting assessment.

Primary HV Method of Supply.description: Remove existing OH HV conductor from poles 283061 to 283063.
Remove existing OH HV conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121.
Install new OH HV conductor 19/3.25 AAC Neptune from new poles 1 to 3.
Install new OH HV conductor 7/4.50 AAC from new pole 2 to pole 426121.

Compliance Standards.description: All OH line design as per MDI0031 & MCI0005.

Consolidated High Voltage Information.description: Remove existing OH HV conductor from poles 283061 to 283063.
Remove existing OH HV conductor from pole 283062 to pole 426121.
Install new OH HV conductor 19/3.25 AAC Neptune from new poles 1 to 3.
Install new OH HV conductor 7/4.50 AAC from new pole 2 to pole 426121.
All OH line design as per MDI0031 & MCI0005.

1. THIS DRAWING IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH
THE RELEVANT ENDEAVOUR ENERGY NETWORK
STANDARDS AND CONNECT ON POLICY.
2. ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CONTACT PHONE: 131 081.
3. DESIGN CERTIFICATION SHALL LAPSE WHERE:→
(i) NOTICE OF INTENT HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED→
WITHIN SIX (6) MONTHS OF THIS
CERTIFICATION.
OR
(ii) WORKS COMPLETED CONSTRUCTION HAS
BEEN INTERRUPTED FOR MORE THAN SIX (6)
MONTHS.
WHERE DESIGN CERTIFICATION HAS LAPSED THE
DESIGN MUST BE RESUBMITTED FOR CERTIFICATION
BY THE ACCREDITED DESIGNER.
4. ATTENTION:
PERMANENT SURVEY MARKS MAY EXIST IN THIS
AREA. THESE MARKS ARE TO BE LOCATED BY A
SURVEYOR PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF ANY
WORKS.
5. ATTENTION
ALL SERVICES SEARCHES MUST BE CHECKED
BEFORE CONSTRUCTION.
6. WARNING
LIVE ENDEAVOUR ENERGY CABLES & OTHER SERVICES
IN THIS AREA. PLEASE CONTACT DIAL BEFORE YOU DIG ON
(TWO (2) DAYS PRIOR TO EXCAVATION
7. ATTENTION
SERVICE PROVIDER TO NOTIFY ENDEAVOUR
ENERGY'S ASSET DATA CUSTOMER DEPARTMENT
DAILY WHEN CABLE WORKS IS IN PROGRESS.
TELEPHONE: 131 081.
8. OPERATIONAL LIMITS
UNLESS APPROVED OTHERWISE, INTERRUPTION TO
ANY CUSTOMER'S SUPPLY MUST BE AVOIDED. THE
FOLLOWING ALTERNATIVES SHOULD BE
CONSIDERED:
• MOBILE GENERATOR AND SUBSTATIONS;
• LIVE LINE WORK;
• DESIGN ALTERNATIVES;
• LOW VOLTAGE PARALLELS;
• WORK PRACTICE/ STANDARDS;
THE COST IS TO BE FUNDED BY THE
CUSTOMER/DEVELOPER.
9. REIMBURSEMENTS WILL BE PAID TO THE NOMINATED
PARTY ON THE LETTER OF INTENT AFTER THE
WORKS HAVE BEEN COMPLETED AND THE LETTER OF
ACCEPTANCE HAS BEEN ISSUED. THE REIMBURSED
AMOUNT IS SHOWN IN THE FUNDING ARRANGEMENTS
FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ANY DISAGREEMENT WITH THE
AMOUNT SHOULD BE RESOLVED IN WRITING WITH ENDEAVOUR
ENERGY PRIOR TO THE COMMENCEMENT OF WORKS.
10. HAVE ALL THE EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD
CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF
DESIGN!
11. ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT PLAN: EMP EMS0001
IS PART OF THE DESIGN.
SAFETY IN DESIGN INFORMATION
SAFETY IN DESIGN ISSUES HAVE BEEN
ASSESSED AS PART OF THE DESIGN
PROCESS. ALL REASONABLE STEPS HAVE
BEEN TAKEN TO ENSURE HAZARDS AND RISKS
NORMALLY ASSOCIATED WITH THIS TYPE OF
DESIGN HAVE BEEN MITIGATED AND/OR
CONTROLLED.
RESIDUAL HAZARDS AND RISKS AND/OR
HAZARDS AND RISKS NOT NORMALLY
ASSOCIATED WITH THIS TYPE OF WORK WHICH
MAY REQUIRE SUBSEQUENT CONSIDERATION
AND/OR ACTION ARE DESCRIBED IN: -
ARP5495 - Design Safety Report
